"<hl.3TI. 3298( 31), � 24 �. 2009 i:m mitf,rn f<l;m '1'11 I MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE (Department of Agriculture and Co-operation) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 21st April, 2010 S.O. 907(E).-ln exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (I) of Section 3 of the Destructive Insects and Pests Act, 1914 (2 ofl914), the Central Government, hereby makes the following Order further to amend the Plant Quarantine (Regulation of Import into India) Order, 2003, namely:- . 1. (I) This Order may be called the Plant Quarantine (Regulation oflmport into India) (First Amendment), Order. 2010. , 1490 Gi/2010 ( I ) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF I N D I A : EXTRAORDINARY [PART ll�SEC. 3(ii)j (2) It shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Plant Quarantine (Regulation of Import into India) Order, 2003, in Schedule I, under the heading "Seaports", alter serial number 35, and the entry relating thereto the following serial numbers and entries shall be added, namely :- "36. Karaikal (Puduchcrry) 37. Pipavav(Gujarat)" [F. No. 35- I /2009-PI'. 11] PANK/\J KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Note : The Plant Quarantine (Regulation of Import into India) Order, 2003 was published in the Gazette of India vide number S . O . 1322(E), dated ' I 8th November, 2003, subsequently amended vide number S.0. 167(E), dated 6th February, 2004, S.O. 427(E), dated 29th March, 2004, S.O. 644(£), dated 31st May, 2004, S.O. 263(E), dated 25th February, 2005, S.O. 462(E), dated 3 1 s t March, 2005.
